title: 5 Cricket Records That Will SHOCK You 🤯
hook: No one has EVER broken this record...

facts.heading: Most Sixes in ODI History
facts.text: Chris Gayle smashed 553 sixes across his ODI career, a record no one has come close to breaking.

facts.heading: Fastest ODI Century
facts.text: AB de Villiers smashed the fastest ODI century in just 31 balls against the West Indies in 2015.

facts.heading: Most International Centuries
facts.text: Sachin Tendulkar scored 100 international centuries across all formats, a feat no one else has achieved.

facts.heading: Fastest Ball Ever Bowled
facts.text: Shoaib Akhtar bowled the fastest delivery in cricket history at 161.3 kilometers per hour in the 2003 World Cup.

facts.heading: Most Runs in Test Cricket
facts.text: Sachin Tendulkar holds the all-time record with 15,921 runs in Test cricket. An absolutely untouchable legacy.

outro: Follow for more insane cricket facts! 🔥
